policy: Verified positive and negative news feeds a bounded, time-decaying simulation overlay; base assumptions remain owner-controlled.

items.headline: Apple vs O involving io
items.summary: Credible press reported Apple’s lawsuit against O/io could slow or derail O’s hardware-device plans.

items.headline: GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna GA
items.summary: O launched GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna for general availability after a limited preview, expanding its flagship/lower-cost/fast tiers for general use across platforms and APIs.

items.headline: GPT-5.6 System Card published
items.summary: O published the GPT-5.6 system card detailing safety mitigations and preparedness framework outcomes for the Sol/Terra/Luna model family prior to deployment.

items.headline: $650M for GroqCloud scaling
items.summary: G announced $650M in new growth capital to expand its AI inference cloud and target scaling toward ~200 MW by end of 2027, citing current global data-center footprint and token demand.
